# JKKN College of Arts and Science

> Autonomous institution affiliated to Periyar University, offering 27+ UG, PG and PhD programmes in Arts, Science and Commerce. Located on NH-544, Komarapalayam, near Erode, Tamil Nadu 638183, India.

## About

JKKN College of Arts and Science (CAS JKKN) is an autonomous college established in 1994 as part of J.K.K. Nattraja Educational Institutions (founded 1952). The college is spread across 15 acres on the Salem-Coimbatore Highway (NH-544) and serves 1,969+ students. It is affiliated to Periyar University and accredited by NAAC. The college was formerly known as Alamelu Angappan College for Women (founded 1974) and became co-educational in 2008. It is a donation-free institution offering merit-based admissions.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 1994 (parent trust: 1952)
- Status: Autonomous (UGC-granted)
- Affiliation: Periyar University, Salem
- Accreditation: NAAC Accredited
- Campus: 15 acres, Komarapalayam, Namakkal District
- Students: 1,969+
- Faculty: 39 Ph.D. holders, 25 SET/NET qualified
- Programmes: 15 UG + 10 PG + 3 Ph.D.
- Location: NH-544, between Salem and Coimbatore
- Nearest cities: Erode (25 km), Salem (55 km), Namakkal (30 km)

## Programmes Offered

### Undergraduate (UG) — Aided
- B.A. English
- B.A. History
- B.Com.
- B.Sc. Chemistry
- B.Sc. Mathematics
- B.Sc. Zoology

### Undergraduate (UG) — Self-Finance
- B.A. English
- B.B.A.
- B.C.A.
- B.Com. (Accounting & Finance)
- B.Com. (Banking & Insurance)
- B.Com. (Computer Applications)
- B.Sc. Artificial Intelligence & Data Science
- B.Sc. Computer Science
- B.Sc. Computer Science (Cyber Security)
- B.Sc. Microbiology
- B.Sc. Physics
- B.Sc. Textile & Fashion Designing
- B.Sc. Visual Communication

### Postgraduate (PG) — Aided
- M.A. History
- M.C.A.
- M.Com.
- M.Sc. Chemistry
- M.Sc. Computer Science
- M.Sc. Physics
- M.Sc. Zoology

### Postgraduate (PG) — Self-Finance
- M.A. English
- M.Com.
- M.Sc. Computer Science
- M.Sc. Computer Science (Data Analytics)
- M.Sc. Mathematics

### Doctoral (Ph.D.)
- Ph.D. Chemistry
- Ph.D. Tamil
- Ph.D. Zoology

## Contact

- Website: https://cas.jkkn.ac.in
- Phone: +91 93458 55001
- Email: arts@jkkn.ac.in
- Admissions: https://admission.jkkn.ac.in
- Placements: https://placements.jkkn.ac.in
- Address: JKKN College of Arts and Science, Natarajapuram, NH-544, Komarapalayam, Namakkal, Tamil Nadu 638183, India

## Parent Organization

J.K.K. Nattraja Educational Institutions — a multi-institution educational group comprising 7 colleges and 2 schools including Dental, Pharmacy, Nursing, Engineering, Allied Health Sciences, Education, and two schools (Matriculation HSS and CBSE).

- Group website: https://jkkn.ac.in
- Wikipedia: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/J._K._K._Nattraja_Educational_Institutions

## Social Media

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jkknarts
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jkknarts
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/school/jkknarts

## Facilities

- 500+ bed multi-specialty teaching hospital (group)
- Central library with digital access
- Computer labs with modern infrastructure
- Auditorium and seminar halls
- Hostel (separate for boys and girls)
- Sports complex with indoor stadium and gymnasium
- Transport from Erode, Salem, Namakkal and surrounding areas
- Food court and bank/post office on campus
